auto.description: Platform-aware: shift keys on native, safe keys in browser

keyboardShift.comment: Traditional - works on native, causes Sticky Keys in browser

arrowLR.comment: Left/right arrow keys for two-option tasks

mousebutton.comment: Click anywhere with left/right mouse buttons

mousetarget.comment: Click on visual targets (auto-sized by device)

touchtarget.comment: Tap on visual targets for touchscreen (larger targets)

spacebar.comment: Single-key response for go-nogo and continuous performance tasks

leftclick.comment: Single left-click response for go-nogo with mouse

touchscreen.comment: Single tap/touch response for go-nogo on touchscreen devices - accepts taps anywhere

clicktarget.comment: Single clickable target for go-nogo with mouse

mouseOnly.comment: Task handles mouse directly (e.g., drawing, clicking objects)

none.comment: No response UI - task handles responses directly or uses layout zones only (Category 3 migrations)

userselect.comment: User selects their own keys at runtime - accessible for all keyboard layouts

prompts.selectResponse: Press the key you want to use to respond
prompts.selectLeft: Press the key you want to use for LEFT responses
prompts.selectRight: Now press the key for RIGHT responses
prompts.errorSpecialKey:
That key cannot be used (modifier/function keys not allowed).

Press any key to try again
prompts.errorSameKey:
Keys must be different!

Press any key to try again
prompts.testRight: Good! Now press your RIGHT key
prompts.errorWrongLeft:
That was the RIGHT key, not the LEFT key!

Press any key to start over
prompts.errorWrongRight:
That was the LEFT key, not the RIGHT key!

Press any key to start over
